the lineup

Apps

One app live on Google Play, with more carrying the Null on the way.

Live

NullState

A distraction-free focus timer and journal in one — a custom timer with Strict Mode, weekly stats, and a clean journal. Fully offline, no account, no subscription: your data never leaves your phone.

Available now on Android Get it on Google Play
Coming soon

NullPoint

A distraction-free writing surface that clears itself once you are done — so a blank page never feels heavy again.

In development — carrying the Null.
Coming soon

NullTrace

Private, on-device habit tracking. Watch your streaks build without a single byte of your data ever leaving your phone.

In development — carrying the Null.
Coming soon

NullFlow

Lightweight automations for the small, repetitive tasks you keep forgetting to do. Set it once, then forget it on purpose.

In development — carrying the Null.
the studio

About

NullDevelopment is the solo studio of Giorgi Pataridze — one person doing the design, the code, and the shipping, all from one desk. No team, no roadmap theatre; just small, useful things released when they're ready.

The quirk is in the name: every product carries the Null. It's a nod to the empty set — each app starts from nothing and only earns what it keeps. If a feature can't justify its weight, it doesn't ship.

Get in touch

Questions, feedback, or just want to talk shop about an app idea? There's no contact form here — a real inbox works better.
